commands: JAX_PLATFORM_NAME=cpu taskset -c 0-3 python <inline proof generator; each real.exe subprocess also taskset -c 0-3 ./real.exe>
input_state_source: real.exe regenerated all_ic_times wrfinput_d01 endpoint fixtures from WPS met_em in scratch directories; retained wrfbdy_d01 files remain the comparison oracle
residual_risks: S3 proof isolates lateral_bc coupling/stuff/tendency using real.exe endpoint wrfinput fixtures because S1/S2 native lanes are separate and not implemented in this worktree.
RealInitConfig has no frozen use_theta_m switch; S3 follows Canary/WRF default moist-theta THM for T_B* and will need a manager-owned type update if a future case sets use_theta_m=0.
Hydrometeor fields beyond QVAPOR are implemented when present on snapshots, but no frozen WRFBDY_TOLS entries exist for those fields in v0.4.0 S0.
tolerance_source: gpuwrf.init.real_init.types.WRFBDY_TOLS; tendency tolerances are value tolerances divided by interval_seconds
